programme.title: Australia's Best Pools
programme.desc: A reno project that delivers style, safety and fun in Sydney, something new and different a pool for ... dogs and on the waterfront of one of Australia's best beaches sits this acclaimed architect's latest pool.

programme.title: Ugliest House in America
programme.desc: After a coast-to-coast search, Retta announces which ugly-in-paradise home receives a $150,000 makeover.

programme.title: Alan Cummings: Paradise Homes
programme.desc: Alan returns to his rugged roots of the Scottish Highlands to visit and extraordinary hidden nature getaway and tours an eccentric family home built above a cave with intricate space-saving details.

programme.title: Renovation Nation
programme.desc: In Cornwall, interior designer Anouska and Greig create a basement cinema room. Rosi and Antony attempt to transport 300 tonnes of salvaged items to their Scottish farmhouse.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Terry and Ashley have a battle with nature as they try to get their garden - abandoned for 100 years - under control; May and Guy race to transform a terrace in 24 hours, Sarah and George get the party started.

programme.title: The Block: Fans v Faves
programme.desc: There's 48 hours until our teams need to deliver their first bedrooms, and the contestants have Keith on the warpath. He's impressed by one team of fans but not so impressed with one team of faves.

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina spot a home in Whittier, California, oozing with summertime potential. Its large pool and 'hardscaped' backyard have seen better days but, with the right touch, could become an entertainer's oasis once again.

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a large home in Cypress, California. They know they can make money on this flip but the comparable sales indicate that an amazing backyard with a pool could bring even more profit.

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Armed with a new toy - a metal detector primed for unearthing hidden treasure - the family head outside to see if the Chateau's grounds have any secrets to share.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A New Jersey-based flight attendant on unpaid leave moves for his husband's job to London. He wants an affordable flat that fits his exacting taste.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Nobody Puts Baby in a Corner in Mexico City
programme.desc: After starting remote hospitality companies, new parents yearn for city-life resources near family in Mexico City.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A grad student is ready to purchase a home in Statesboro, Georgia. Due to the area's competitive housing market, a fixer is on the table, as is having roommates to help with the cost.

programme.title: Home Town Takeover
programme.desc: Ben and Erin bring back a piece of history honouring Wetumpka's first female mayor by rejuvenating the event space that shares her name; Randy Fenoli makes a bride's big day.

programme.title: Good Bones
programme.desc: Mother and daughter duo Karen E Laine and Mina Starsiak are setting out to revitalise their hometown of Indianapolis, one property at a time.

programme.title: Good Bones
programme.desc: Mina and Karen look to turn an old garage on one of their rental properties into a tiny home for Mina's brother, Tad. With foundation issues and a mysterious broken pipe, this tiny home has massive issues.

programme.title: The Nate & Jeremiah Home Project
programme.sub-title: Home Is Where the Art Is
programme.desc: A family with four growing children doesn't want to leave their beloved home, but they desperately need to expand their footprint.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A New Jersey-based flight attendant on unpaid leave moves for his husband's job to London. He wants an affordable flat that fits his exacting taste.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Nobody Puts Baby in a Corner in Mexico City
programme.desc: After starting remote hospitality companies, new parents yearn for city-life resources near family in Mexico City.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A grad student is ready to purchase a home in Statesboro, Georgia. Due to the area's competitive housing market, a fixer is on the table, as is having roommates to help with the cost.

programme.title: Epic Builds
programme.desc: Builders attempt to deliver a luxury home to the top of a mountain, hauling massive modules up a steep, single-lane dirt road where one mistake could bring the entire project to a standstill.

programme.title: Good Bones
programme.desc: Mother and daughter duo Karen E Laine and Mina Starsiak are setting out to revitalise their hometown of Indianapolis, one property at a time.

programme.title: Good Bones
programme.desc: Mina and Karen look to turn an old garage on one of their rental properties into a tiny home for Mina's brother, Tad. With foundation issues and a mysterious broken pipe, this tiny home has massive issues.

programme.title: The Nate & Jeremiah Home Project
programme.sub-title: Home Is Where the Art Is
programme.desc: A family with four growing children doesn't want to leave their beloved home, but they desperately need to expand their footprint.

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina spot a home in Whittier, California, oozing with summertime potential. Its large pool and 'hardscaped' backyard have seen better days but, with the right touch, could become an entertainer's oasis once again.

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a large home in Cypress, California. They know they can make money on this flip but the comparable sales indicate that an amazing backyard with a pool could bring even more profit.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Nobody Puts Baby in a Corner in Mexico City
programme.desc: After starting remote hospitality companies, new parents yearn for city-life resources near family in Mexico City.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A grad student is ready to purchase a home in Statesboro, Georgia. Due to the area's competitive housing market, a fixer is on the table, as is having roommates to help with the cost.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Dreaming of a Suite Life by the Beach in Lusby, MD
programme.desc: After finding their dream beach house, a Virginia couple reworks the floor plan to create an expanded primary suite.

programme.title: The Garden Gurus
programme.desc: The gurus will show you a garden feed that gets to work immediately for all plants in the garden, and we introduce you to some apples with surprising health benefits.

programme.title: The Block: Fans v Faves
programme.desc: There's 48 hours until our teams need to deliver their first bedrooms, and the contestants have Keith on the warpath. He's impressed by one team of fans but not so impressed with one team of faves.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A New Jersey-based flight attendant on unpaid leave moves for his husband's job to London. He wants an affordable flat that fits his exacting taste.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Nobody Puts Baby in a Corner in Mexico City
programme.desc: After starting remote hospitality companies, new parents yearn for city-life resources near family in Mexico City.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A grad student is ready to purchase a home in Statesboro, Georgia. Due to the area's competitive housing market, a fixer is on the table, as is having roommates to help with the cost.

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina spot a home in Whittier, California, oozing with summertime potential. Its large pool and 'hardscaped' backyard have seen better days but, with the right touch, could become an entertainer's oasis once again.

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a large home in Cypress, California. They know they can make money on this flip but the comparable sales indicate that an amazing backyard with a pool could bring even more profit.

programme.title: Good Bones
programme.desc: Mother and daughter duo Karen E Laine and Mina Starsiak are setting out to revitalise their hometown of Indianapolis, one property at a time.

programme.title: The Nate & Jeremiah Home Project
programme.sub-title: Home Is Where the Art Is
programme.desc: A family with four growing children doesn't want to leave their beloved home, but they desperately need to expand their footprint.

programme.title: Home Town Takeover
programme.desc: Ben and Erin bring back a piece of history honouring Wetumpka's first female mayor by rejuvenating the event space that shares her name; Randy Fenoli makes a bride's big day.

programme.title: The Block: Fans v Faves
programme.desc: The contestants hand over their first completed room, the guest bedroom. For the first time, the judges don't know whose rooms they are judging.

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a split-level home in Long Beach, California. The style is unique among the other homes in the neighbourhood, and the small backyard is ripe for creating classic California style indoor/outdoor living.

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a home in Torrance, California, that's just kilometres from the ocean and several upscale beach communities. The yard is small and tiered, but buyers in this area demand luxury and are willing to pay top dollar to get it.

programme.title: Good Bones
programme.desc: Mina and Karen look to turn an old garage on one of their rental properties into a tiny home for Mina's brother, Tad. With foundation issues and a mysterious broken pipe, this tiny home has massive issues.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: An international couple seeks a better work-life balance and looks to move from Singapore to Malmo, Sweden. She wants to be close to relaxing nature, but he's a chef and needs to be near the city.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Arizona House Flippers Seek R&R in Costa Rica
programme.desc: Burned out from working long hours in real estate, an Arizona family looks for relaxation in the jungles of Ojochal, Costa Rica.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: An actress is ready to purchase her first home in Chicago. She's looking for a one-bedroom condo with outdoor space for her dog, but her mom suggests for a bigger, two-bedroom place.

programme.title: Bargain Block
programme.desc: The boys take on a desolate house that Evan has gifted Keith for his birthday. Keith seizes the opportunity to push the laws of nature and design to create a truly scientific dream home.

programme.title: Fix My Flip
programme.desc: Page assists flipping partners who face a huge challenge of selling a home they bought on a dead-end alley next to a pig farm.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: After Lady Luck rewards a retired firefighter for a lifetime of service with a big win, dream home hunter David Bromstad helps him search for the perfect bachelor pad in the Lakeland region of Florida.

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House
programme.desc: Despite having no DIY experience, a couple have been working on their fixer-upper every weekend for three years.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: An international couple seeks a better work-life balance and looks to move from Singapore to Malmo, Sweden. She wants to be close to relaxing nature, but he's a chef and needs to be near the city.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Arizona House Flippers Seek R&R in Costa Rica
programme.desc: Burned out from working long hours in real estate, an Arizona family looks for relaxation in the jungles of Ojochal, Costa Rica.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: An actress is ready to purchase her first home in Chicago. She's looking for a one-bedroom condo with outdoor space for her dog, but her mom suggests for a bigger, two-bedroom place.

programme.title: Bargain Block
programme.desc: The boys take on a desolate house that Evan has gifted Keith for his birthday. Keith seizes the opportunity to push the laws of nature and design to create a truly scientific dream home.

programme.title: Fix My Flip
programme.desc: Page assists flipping partners who face a huge challenge of selling a home they bought on a dead-end alley next to a pig farm.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: After Lady Luck rewards a retired firefighter for a lifetime of service with a big win, dream home hunter David Bromstad helps him search for the perfect bachelor pad in the Lakeland region of Florida.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: A $5 million lottery win has one lucky New York woman looking for a lakefront vacation cottage where she can relax with her girlfriends. David Bromstad steps in to find some perfect properties.

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House
programme.desc: Despite having no DIY experience, a couple have been working on their fixer-upper every weekend for three years.

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a split-level home in Long Beach, California. The style is unique among the other homes in the neighbourhood, and the small backyard is ripe for creating classic California style indoor/outdoor living.

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a home in Torrance, California, that's just kilometres from the ocean and several upscale beach communities. The yard is small and tiered, but buyers in this area demand luxury and are willing to pay top dollar to get it.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Arizona House Flippers Seek R&R in Costa Rica
programme.desc: Burned out from working long hours in real estate, an Arizona family looks for relaxation in the jungles of Ojochal, Costa Rica.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: An actress is ready to purchase her first home in Chicago. She's looking for a one-bedroom condo with outdoor space for her dog, but her mom suggests for a bigger, two-bedroom place.

programme.title: Getaway
programme.desc: We continue our Mekong River cruise arriving in the Cambodian capital Phnom Penh before crossing the border into Vietnam and winding up at the magical Mekong Delta.

programme.title: Postcards
programme.desc: Brodie takes her dog Willow for a day out in North Melbourne. Livinia discovers a winery in Mount Macedon. Kris is at the Williamstown Sailing Club. And guest presenter Neary Ty visits a retro Chinese restaurant in Boronia.

programme.title: The Garden Gurus
programme.desc: The team show you a fantastic and beautiful way to heat your outdoor area, take you to a unique rooftop garden, and teach you why autumn is the best time of the year to be in the garden.

programme.title: The Block: Fans v Faves
programme.desc: The contestants hand over their first completed room, the guest bedroom. For the first time, the judges don't know whose rooms they are judging.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: An international couple seeks a better work-life balance and looks to move from Singapore to Malmo, Sweden. She wants to be close to relaxing nature, but he's a chef and needs to be near the city.

programme.title: Hello SA
programme.desc: We visit The Scenic Hotel and That's Enrico in the Adelaide Hills, find school holiday fun at Bounce Inc. and the new Wallis Cinema Glenelg, check out the Wheelchair Rugby World Challenge and meet Taryn Brumfitt.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: An actress is ready to purchase her first home in Chicago. She's looking for a one-bedroom condo with outdoor space for her dog, but her mom suggests for a bigger, two-bedroom place.

programme.title: Epic Builds
programme.desc: Builders attempt to deliver a luxury home to the top of a mountain, hauling massive modules up a steep, single-lane dirt road where one mistake could bring the entire project to a standstill.

programme.title: Bargain Block
programme.desc: The boys take on a desolate house that Evan has gifted Keith for his birthday. Keith seizes the opportunity to push the laws of nature and design to create a truly scientific dream home.
